/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/delay_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libdelay_plugin.so -o libdelay_plugin.so CMakeFiles/delay_plugin.dir/delay_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/delay_plugin.dir/delay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/delay_plugin.dir/delay_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
